name: Urasenke YOUWAKAI Tea Ceremony
editor_note: Well-known tea practitioners are involved in this school, and the tea room is unusually spacious. It takes a little courage to inquire, but this opens the door to the real depth of the culture.
notes: Usucha (thin tea) program. Hosted with involvement of Sosei Ajioka. Reservations accepted Mondays, Wednesdays, and Thursdays only. Same school as author — priority for first-hand review visit.
